name: CATACLYSM: Even Angels Sin
short_description: CATACLYSM: Even Angels Sin is an FPS Bullet Hell with UNLIMITED movement. Breach the Sinner's Paradise as the Heaven Breaker and reclaim the divine realm from hordes of false Angels.
detailed_description:
Merging the fast-paced gameplay of movement shooters like DOOM and ULTRAKILL with a 3D conversion of complex bullet hells like the Touhou Project, CATACLYSM: Even Angels Sin boasts UNLIMITED movement amidst a sea of projectiles.

MAN ABANDONED GOD

SO GOD ABANDONED MAN

AND ANOTHER TOOK HIS PLACE

Inspired by the works of Dante Alighieri, John Milton, and William Blake, the Throne of Heaven is controlled by the deities mankind worship. Throughout history, dozens, if not hundred of deities ruled over the mortal and divine realms. As time passed, this number continued to dwindle, until only one remained, and eventually... None. The Throne remained vacant, aligning the stars perfectly for a malicious beast to steal its power, creating their own Angels and slaughtering all other entities in Heaven, transforming the one Paradise left into a twisted realm of chaos. As what little remaining gods fled, one dared stand.

The Heaven Breaker, whose bullet will rapture Heaven and reclaim Paradise.

  • Play as Mictian, the Aztec god of death, and take back the realm of Heaven.

  • Fight through swarms of false Angels while utilizing unlimited movement to avoid a 3D bullet heaven of attacks.

  • Build your arsenal and create the perfect loadout.

  • Equippable passive abilities allow for fully customizable gameplay.

FOREVER LOST, WE CHANT HIS NAME,

BUT TO HIM, OUR REMARKS ARE JUST THE SAME.

HE SHALL BE OUR SALVATION,

FOR HE HAS MADE A REVELATION.

HE WILL BREACH THE SINNER'S PARADISE,

AND ONCE MORE RECLAIM THE NAME OF CHRIST.

HE WILL SAVE US FROM THEIR CATECHISM,

FOR HE SHALL BE THEIR CATACLYSM.

WE CALL TO YOU, O HEAVEN BREAKER.

WE CALL TO YOU, LORD MICTIAN.
